pundit.name: Eric Wynalda
pundit.take: **Zach, a.k.a. "Mustard Boy," is the only true manager here; the rest are clowns fumbling with a sport they clearly don't understand.** Look, when you've played in a World Cup like I have, you see the game differently. And right now, Zach sits atop the standings because he had the foresight to draft Brazil. That's winning strategy. Meanwhile, Devin, our so-called "Ghost Pepper," picked Haiti, which is laughable at best. Did you just close your eyes and point at a map, Devin? Haiti is set to be trampled by Brazil because selecting a Tier 4 team against a powerhouse is what amateurs do. But honestly, what should we expect from the rest of the pack? Rafe, "The Noisemaker," might as well not even show up; his draft was a three-ring circus with Germany as the only light in a dark, embarrassing tunnel. If Gayden, "The Backpass Assassin," could stop sending the ball backward, maybe England wouldn't disappoint him at every turn. Gunner? Oh, "Bubba G," enjoyed a shocking victory with Canada against Qatar, but don't mistake flukes for future success. Mark my words: Brazil will crush Haiti, and Zach's lead will only grow, proving once again that most of these managers belong in a comedy club, not a World Cup pool.

pundit_takes.headline: Zach's Switzerland Secures Decisive Win While Devin Skates on Thin Ice
pundit_takes.subtitle: Devin's Bosnia performs so poorly, Ghost Pepper now known as Mild Salsa.

pundit_takes.headline: Gunner's Canadian Goal Fest Sparks Rare Three-Point Celebration
pundit_takes.subtitle: Bubba G celebrates like it's the Stanley Cup, not World Cup.

pundit_takes.headline: USA Poised to Edge Out Undrafted Australia in Seattle Showdown
pundit_takes.subtitle: Ghost Pepper banking on home field advantage and Devin's lucky socks.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy's Brazil Set for Tactical Extermination of Haiti
pundit_takes.subtitle: Devin hopes for divine intervention as South America meets Caribbean.

rome_analytics_quotes: Zach rockets to the top while Rafe plummets like a stock market crash.
Rafe's Tier-1 pick depends heavily on Germany; hope he doesn't crash like his draft.
Rafe's differential against Devin is 6-0; talk about owning real estate in his mind.
The model slept on Rafe's random chaos; even a broken clock is right twice a day.
